title: CC (Central Coordinator) Device Firmware Update - Initiation
steps: Launch the app and ensure the user is logged in
Navigate to the device management screen
Select a Central Coordinator (CC) device from the device list
Tap on the 'Firmware Update' or 'DFU' option for the CC device
Verify that the DFU initiation screen appears without crashing
Check that the current firmware version is displayed
Tap 'Start Update' or equivalent button
expected: The CC DFU process initiates successfully without any app crash. The user sees a progress indicator or confirmation that the update has started.

title: CC (Central Coordinator) Device Firmware Update - Progress Monitoring
steps: Initiate a CC DFU as per the previous test case
Observe the DFU progress screen
Monitor the progress bar or percentage indicator for at least 10 seconds
Verify that the progress updates in real-time
Check that the app does not freeze or crash during the update process
expected: The DFU progress updates smoothly without any app crash or freeze. The progress indicator shows accurate and incremental progress.

title: CC (Central Coordinator) Device Firmware Update - Completion
steps: Wait for the CC DFU process to complete
Observe the completion/final screen
Verify that a success message is displayed
Check that the new firmware version is shown
Navigate back to the device details screen
Verify the firmware version is updated in the device info
expected: The DFU completes successfully. The app displays a success message with the new firmware version. The device info screen reflects the updated firmware version.

title: CS (Central Switch) Device Firmware Update - Initiation
steps: Launch the app and ensure the user is logged in
Navigate to the device management screen
Select a Central Switch (CS) device from the device list
Tap on the 'Firmware Update' or 'DFU' option for the CS device
Verify that the DFU initiation screen appears without crashing
Check that the current firmware version is displayed
Tap 'Start Update' or equivalent button
expected: The CS DFU process initiates successfully without any app crash. The user sees a progress indicator or confirmation that the update has started.

title: CS (Central Switch) Device Firmware Update - Progress and Completion
steps: Initiate a CS DFU as per the previous test case
Observe the DFU progress screen for the entire duration of the update
Verify that the progress updates in real-time without app freeze
Wait for the DFU process to complete
Verify that a success message is displayed
Check that the new firmware version is shown on the completion screen
Navigate back to device details and confirm the firmware version is updated
expected: The CS DFU progresses smoothly, completes successfully, and the firmware version is updated in the device info. No crashes or freezes occur.

title: Sub-Device Firmware Update - Initiation
steps: Launch the app and ensure the user is logged in
Navigate to the device management screen
Select a parent device (CC or CS) that has sub-devices associated
Navigate to the sub-devices list
Select a sub-device from the list
Tap on the 'Firmware Update' or 'DFU' option for the sub-device
Verify that the DFU initiation screen appears without crashing
Check that the current firmware version of the sub-device is displayed
Tap 'Start Update' or equivalent button
expected: The sub-device DFU process initiates successfully without any app crash. The user sees a progress indicator or confirmation that the update has started.

title: Sub-Device Firmware Update - Progress and Completion
steps: Initiate a sub-device DFU as per the previous test case
Observe the DFU progress screen for the entire duration of the update
Verify that the progress updates in real-time without app freeze or crash
Wait for the DFU process to complete
Verify that a success message is displayed
Check that the new firmware version is shown on the completion screen
Navigate back to the sub-device details and confirm the firmware version is updated
expected: The sub-device DFU progresses smoothly, completes successfully, and the firmware version is updated in the sub-device info. No crashes or freezes occur.

title: Sub-Device Firmware Update - Multiple Sub-Devices Sequential Update
steps: Launch the app and ensure the user is logged in
Navigate to a parent device with multiple sub-devices
Select the first sub-device and initiate DFU
Wait for the first sub-device DFU to complete successfully
Navigate back to the sub-devices list
Select a second sub-device and initiate DFU
Verify that the second DFU starts without crash
Wait for the second sub-device DFU to complete
expected: Multiple sub-devices can be updated sequentially without any app crash. Each DFU completes successfully.

title: DFU Error Handling - Network Interruption During Update
steps: Initiate a DFU for any device (CC, CS, or sub-device)
During the DFU process, simulate a network disconnection (e.g., enable airplane mode)
Observe the app behavior
Verify that an appropriate error message is displayed (e.g., 'Update failed due to network error')
Reconnect the network
Verify that the user can retry the DFU or the app recovers gracefully
expected: The app handles network interruption gracefully without crashing. An appropriate error message is shown, and the user can retry the update after reconnection.

title: DFU Error Handling - Device Disconnection During Update
steps: Initiate a DFU for a device (CC, CS, or sub-device)
During the DFU process, simulate device disconnection (e.g., turn off the device or move out of range)
Observe the app behavior
Verify that an appropriate error message is displayed (e.g., 'Device disconnected. Update failed.')
Verify that the app does not crash
Reconnect the device and verify the user can attempt DFU again
expected: The app handles device disconnection gracefully without crashing. An appropriate error message is shown, and the user can retry the update after reconnection.

title: DFU Cancellation Mid-Update
steps: Initiate a DFU for any device (CC, CS, or sub-device)
While the DFU is in progress, tap the 'Cancel' or 'Stop' button
Verify that the update process stops
Verify that a confirmation dialog appears (if applicable)
Confirm cancellation
Verify that the app returns to the previous screen without crashing
Check that the device firmware version remains unchanged
expected: The DFU can be cancelled mid-update without crashing the app. The device firmware version remains at the previous version.
